---
title: "Daniel López Cano"
about:
  template: trestles
  links:
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/daniellopezcano
---

Postdoctoral researcher in computational cosmology.

Welcome to my personal website. This is the first minimal Quarto version,
created to test the full workflow from local development to GitHub Pages deployment.

## About this website

This is a first test deployment of my personal website.

The goal of this version is simply to verify that:

- the Quarto project builds correctly,
- the website can be previewed locally,
- the rendered files are generated inside `docs/`,
- GitHub Pages publishes the site successfully.

## Research interests

My research focuses on computational cosmology, large-scale structure, and machine learning applications in astrophysics.

## Next steps

Future versions of this site will include:

- selected publications,
- talks and presentations,
- software and scientific projects,
- a CV page,
- technical notes and resources.
